'''Brian Campbell''' is an author who contributed to many of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Wizards of the Coast]] sourcebooks includeing ''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'', ''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' and ''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''.

{{Author-stub}}

==Sources==
*''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'' (2001)
*''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]'' (2001)
*''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' (2001)
*''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' (2001)
*''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' (2002)
*''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]]'' (2002)
*''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' (2003)

[[Category:Role-playing game authors]]
